en: I can't believe it, in just a week she'll be off to Smeltings.
ko: 믿을 수 없어, 일주일이면 Smeltings에 가는구나.

en: Caveat Smeltonia, proudest moment of my life.
ko: Caveat Smeltonia, 내 인생 최고의 순간이야.

en: Will I have to wear that too?
Don't be so stupid. You're going to go to the state school where you belong.
ko: 바보같이 굴지 마. 넌 네가 있을 공립학교에 갈 거야.

en: Now this is what you're going to be wearing when I've finished dyeing it.
ko: 이건 내가 염색 끝나면 네가 입을 거야.

en: But that's Dudley's old uniform. It'll fit me like bits of old elephant skin.
ko: 그건 Dudley 낡은 교복이잖아요. 낡은 코끼리 가죽 조각처럼 맞겠네요.

en: Go and get the post. Go!
